elements.original_description: A colorful cartoon map with winding paths, dollar signs, and question marks scattered across it, placed on a pure white background. A confused cartoon character stands at a crossroads holding a magnifying glass.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a colorful cartoon map on a pure white background. The map features winding paths, scattered dollar signs, and scattered question marks. At a crossroads on the map, a confused cartoon character stands holding a magnifying glass. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients.
